name: Fireworks AI
author: TypeWhisper
description: Cloud transcription and LLM via Fireworks AI. Streaming transcription, fast inference, requires API key.

descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription und LLM ueber Fireworks AI. Streaming-Transkription, schnelle Inferenz, erfordert API-Key.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 Fireworks AI 进行云端转录和 LLM，流式转录，快速推理，需 API 密钥。
